headline: Tesla Tracking Employees With In-Person Attendance Required: Here Are The Details
summary: Electric vehicle company Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) announced recently it would require remote workers to return to the office for in-person work. It appeared the company is pretty serious with a new report that stated workers were being tracked and then emailed if they hadn’t returned.
